prompt:
First-person (head-mounted) camera footage of a worker in an electronics factory, looking down at their own hands. The worker wears a blue smock. (time t=0.0s). Report only what you can see (no guessing).
Fields:
- hold_cable: Is the worker holding a cable, connector, or small part in the hands? (answer with yes or no)
- seated_work: Is the worker seated and doing handwork over their lap, with body or knees filling the lower half of the frame? (answer with yes or no)
- rack_visible: Are multiple shelves of green circuit boards visible in the frame? (answer with yes or no)
Fill each JSON value with exactly one allowed word (e.g. yes/no/unclear). Do NOT repeat the question text as the value:
